title: drosera kihlmanii
intro: Drosera kihlmanii is a species of carnivorous plant, also known as the sundew, belonging to the Droseraceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Costa Rica and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Drosera kihlmanii include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its ability to boost the immune system. Drosera kihlmanii can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
